results.title: Can A Vitamin Deficiency Affect Your Sex Life?
results.description: Low levels of Vitamin D have been associated with reduced libido, fatigue, mood disturbances, and erectile dysfunction in some men.

results.title: Viral Video: Chaos Ensues At Cocktail 2 Pune Event, Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna And Kriti Sanon Make Hurried Exit As Crowd Gets Unruly
results.description: The cast of Cocktail 2 got trapped in a chaotic situation during the film's pre-release event in Pune. A video of Shahid Kapoor, Rashmika Mandanna and Kriti Sanon being escorted out of the venue is going viral online.
